text: Great experience.
Wonderful customer service and great service l

I rarely leave negative reviews, but my recent experience with Mavis Tires & Brakes was extremely disappointing and concerning.

I originally visited the Pineville location because I had a bubble in my tire …. a serious safety issue that needed immediate attention. Since the tires I needed were not in stock, I ordered all four through Goodyear and scheduled an appointment for installation. Somehow, there was confusion between the Pineville and South Park locations regarding where my appointment was actually scheduled.

After calling ahead, I was told appointments “don’t really matter” because there was only one tire machine available. I still arrived at the South Park location at 8:30 AM hoping to get the issue resolved. By 11:15 AM, my vehicle still had not been serviced, only for me to learn that only 3 of my 4 tires had arrived and the store supposedly could not contact Goodyear because they are considered a third-party vendor.

The most frustrating part was the overall lack of communication, organization, and accountability. While waiting, I witnessed multiple other customers upset over delays and confusion as well.

I will say Brittany remained professional and understanding throughout the situation, and I appreciate her efforts. However, the overall customer experience and operational process were unacceptable … especially considering this involved a vehicle safety concern.

To make matters worse, after all the inconvenience, delays, and wasted time, I was offered only a $15 voucher, which honestly felt dismissive compared to the experience.

Mavis has significant opportunities to improve communication between locations, appointment systems, inventory coordination, and customer recovery practices.

I hope leadership takes these concerns seriously because customers deserve better.
The service was great, quick and efficient. The customer service was excellent as well. I really enjoyed my time there while waiting.
Very quick service and the staff is knowledgeable and works with you! Highly recommend

The lady manager was rude and argumentative. The two mechanics are lazy and did not want to work on my front brakes had me come to the facility twice made an appointment for them to tell me to come back in the morning. I can back and the mechanic said he couldn’t fix my issue but the manager at the front desk insisted they could. I was also advised the systems were down by the mechanic but the manager refused to understand what I was informed by her coworker it was just a mess and a waist of my time and gas. I recommend going to any concord location very professional!
very nice people very affordable
Brittany was amazing! I had a leak in a tire and was able to get a same day appointment and inspection while I was there.
They are lovely people and the employees are very helpful
They ordered me a new tire and had it put on my truck. Very easy process with little wait time. Z at the front desk was very easy to work with and made the experience a good one!

I would not recommend this shop in particular at this location to anybody so I needed brakes rotors and a caliber right stopped at mavis because it was  pretty bad. Would you believe the guy told me it was gonna be $1300 to fix it came over here off of Sharon amity and central ave to Jonas  auto paid $756. they did not understand why mavis was  up-charging me by $700. The guy was like for the parts and even  labor it does not cost $1400 and while I was at Mavis, the guy tried to convince me that I needed to stay there that they recommended I get a tow truck. They tried to do everything to  convince me to stay  and pay $700 more than what I would've paid anywhere  else I know  cars this is not the first time I had to get brakes and rotors changed the only difference was I had to change a caliber on the driver side. How in the hell is it $1400 for that never again

Brittany has great customer service she was really nice and a great big smile on her face. She was very knowledgeable about all the services and what would be best for me. This will be my new favorite shop to go to get my car repaired

Amazing service, all in! I stopped by on a whim needing a service, oil change, inspection & car wash.. they got all it taken care of for me in record time! They were so helpful and friendly, affordable, great service!
Great experience. Nice and very helpful from the moment I walked in!

Mavis Tires provided a great experience when I stopped in for a quick inspection. The team was fast, professional, and efficient from start to finish. Z was especially helpful and made the process smooth and easy.
Even though I won’t be using them for the repair I need later on, they still took the time to explain what needed to be done, which I really appreciated. After a long day at work, I was glad they were able to get me in and taken care of before closing.
Great service all around—they definitely earned the stars I’m giving them.

I posted the review below about my experience with Mavis in March. I received a response via YELP. I called and was told that once an invoice is initiated by the sales department no refunds can be made. I am still scammed out of $120.00. This is a terrible company to do business with!  

Mavis is a terrible tire company to do business with. They pretend to match or be less than any other company. They used the "old bait and switch" scam. When you call, they quote a cheaper price than competitors by offering "new customer discount" and "family & friends discounts". An appointment was made via email with a store. The email did not contain any of the discussed pricing. I was assured the correct pricing had been sent to the store. After I arrived at the store (heavy rainstorm), I was told the bill would be finalized with the taxes after installation. After a long delay the store informed me, I had to go to another location to get my tire installed. I was scammed out of $120.00. I called customer service stayed on the line approximately 1 hour with no results.

I would go lower on my rating but this is as low as you can go but the service I've been getting from the Independence boulevard Mavis and the Park Road Mavis is out of this world I was told a bunch of lies that gosh strip my studs and swear he didn't do it so now I have to pay somebody to replace my studs on my wheels the guy at the Park Road location highly suggested that I needed camber bolts in order to adjust my alignment only to find out they didn't even know how to use those highly disappointed and I recommend anybody if you're going to use Mavis go to the one on South boulevard so right now I'm feeling like I paid for an alignment but didn't receive it and that is not good
Quick work, very efficient and helpful. I’ve come to them several times in the past year and wouldn’t go anywhere else
The past few years, I’ve had my new car tires bought and serviced here always straightforward, and honest estimates of time and cost.
James was very professional and courteous and assisted me in difficult situation. Highly recommend!
Quick and awesome service! These guys had me in and out in just a few minutes!
Pulled up after work and Z was able to help me out with my TPMS sensor relearn, extremely quick and helpful 👍🏻

Z Was Amazing And Very Friendly! Got straight to the problem and the time was remarkable! I recommend a visit from this place anytime’
The staff was excellent very professional there tech Kevin was great

I got 4 new tires from Mavis and it was a great experience. I called beforehand to ask how online prices compares to prices in the store; the tech was honest and very helpful with decision making and pricing. They did not try to upsell or overcharge, did the work well and efficiently and got my car back to me same day. Can’t ask for much more
these guys are always great.Awesome service in the back. Z is the best upfront
Professional, efficient
Excellent costumer service. Even for a simple wiper change. Z went above and beyond. Def I’ll be back for future maintenance.!

I was having a rough day with my car and staff here were willing to really help me out. They had a free promo for tire rotation & balance, and then also checked out my battery / alternator at no charge. Staff were friendly and down to earth. Will be back!
Best shop in Charlotte!! So friendly and go above and beyond to help you get your car back on the road.
Very friendly
It’s great to have somebody you can trust!

This review is for the Mavis located at 5021 South Blvd, but I can not find their google page as I believe they’re a new location.

Incredible and quick service. Genuinely good people who want to help you out without spending an arm and a leg. Highly recommend for tire needs.
Called for service, wouldn’t recommend.
7th
Had a great experience. They explained everything I needed in a way I could understand and were honest about what was immediately needed and what I can do later.
Tires rotated,  advised me to change tires which I was not aware of,  thanks for being thorough

These guys know what they’re doing. I worked with Zee and he’s the man. Very knowledgeable and kind and even told me somethings about my car to look out for in the near future. He goes above and beyond.

DO NOT GIVE MAVIS YOUR BUSINESS! These people have no sense of urgency, pay little to no attention to detail, and have poor customer service! This was my first visit with mavis, I bought 2 tires and made an appointment online for installation, arrived to the auto shop and there was an employee at the desk lost in thought, not on the phone or his phone, nor looking at the computer. I let him know I made an appointment for installation of 2 tires and an oil change and was told "I didn't see you had made an appointment, I would have called and told you our tires come from a third party and we need to wait for them to arrive" I was a bit annoyed that i was able to schedule an appointment online when in fact service could not be preformed same day, I understand this was a website issue but this just adds to my bad experience with mavis. The following day I go in during my lunch to get my tires and oil change, IT TOOK TWO HOURS. I had never seen people walk and type so slow, while I was waiting for my car the two employees in the front could not pick up the phones or assist a customer standing in front of them without first finishing their personal conversations! And every time they took a call they would ridicule the complaint or question from the customer after the call! Very unprofessional.

To top this off, once I looked at my tires I noticed the new tires we not placed in the front like I had asked since I was advised by two other mechanics to do! I called them straight away and was told the new tires must be placed on the rear with no other explanation. Was told the previous rear tires were rotated to the front and that was a lie! The front two tires were the same from before! Now, cars are not my area of expertise, hence why I am upset at the lack of communication. There was also no sticker reminder placed on my windshield to remind me of my next oil change which adds to no attention to detaol and when driving slow my tires make an odd noise, ultimately had to go to another mechanic front to finally get my front tires replaced.
Did a great job. Saved lots of unnecessary work that dealership was trying to sell. Absolutely will come here going forward
The service was amazing! Zahir was working the desk and he was awesome! answered all of our questions and very insightful definitely our go to place for now on!
They are so polite and got me in so quick I highly recommend it.

I came into town and my tire light came on randomly. I pulled up and immediately Sean or Shawn (not sure how to spell it) set an expectation that it would be about a 5 minute wait and that he would call me up. He helped me in less than the quoted wait time. He was friendly and quick and got me back on the road worry free. Thanks so much! If I’m ever in town again and need tire assistance I’d gladly return and recommend this business.

Worst customer service I ever received on planet earth terrible customer Service this lady is not knowledgeable about what’s happening . They have one lift and be  prepared to leave your car all day if you make an appointment with no notice of time frame . Next time, brush your teeth😊
Took my tire stem cap. Also filled the tires to completely different PSIs after I specifically asked them to make sure they were the same.

I went to Mavis Tires and Brakes because my right rear right tire was low on air due to the cold weather. I needed them to add air and check all the tires to make sure everything was fine. They did a great job, and it was very affordable, only $45 to add air and check the other tire pressures. I was in and out quickly, and overall the service was very good😊

Amazing! I can’t tell you how impressed I am. I show up with a nail in my tire. They were able to extract the nail and told me it was stuck in the treads and it was a little itty-bitty thing and there is no leak. No charge. So hard to find honesty like that!!
Thanks to the staff for being quick and helpful. Better every time.
Thanks so much for helping us on the fly with our low tire pressure. Really appreciated it especially on a cold rainy Sunday!!
Great service. They fixed the wheel balancing issue on my car. My car is now driving great on the high way. Highly recommend.
Gentleman that checked my tire pressure was very kind and helpful. Great service.

This location was extremely friendly and helped me SO much with my car needs! I was recommended to come here and I'm so happy I listened, I will be recommending to all my friends and will be coming back! THANK YOU!!
Very happy with the service at Mavis Tires here and I will definitely be back. I’d like to thank Osean for helping me with my tires and making sure I was all set!
10/10 great experience!

I noticed I had a flat tire one evening at 7 PM. Mavis was closed, so I booked an appointment for 8 am the following morning. I showed up on time and within 5 mins they were able to explain that I needed 2 new tires and what the cheapest route was. Since they were an odd size, they ordered the tires in and had them by 1 PM that same day. My 2 new tires were installed by 6 PM and I was able to take my car on a trip that weekend. Had Mavis not been so accommodating, my entire weekend would have been ruined. The 3 staff members that I spoke with were genuine and honest. It obviously won’t be the last set of tires I need, and I know that I can rely on Mavis on Park Rd when that day comes.
They ere the best
Great experience especially megan at the front desk.
Great service if you are able to get in. Tried multiple times but always a several hour wait time before they even get to my car

I went in for an oil change and new tires it took 6 hours and the lugnuts were not tightened on one tire when I left. The tire was so loud driving away they came out to tighten it but that should not have happened. They also did not allign the tires as stated in the service and the car does not drive straight with the steering wheel straight. These are simple tasks for a routine tire change that were not done or inspected before I got my car. This is just dangerous. Do not go to them.

Never again. This is the fourth time I've dealt with this location. The previous service (NBT) was bad, and the new store (Mavis) isn't any better. I recently scheduled an appointment online but received no communication that the tires weren't available when I arrived. I ended up rescheduling and still had to wait over three hours. Do yourself a favor and go elsewhere -- I repeat, do yourself a favor and go elsewhere.
Was traveling very far and something came up with my car so I stopped at the dillworth location and they took me right in to make sure I was safe. Great folks there.
Mavis did a phenomenal job! Excellent service. Quick service. Thanks for everything.

I conveniently had a flat next door to the South Blvd shop, and Mavis conveniently helped me quickly and expertly. They did not hesitate to get me back on the road as soon as possible. Huge shout out to Chip for the most amazing customer service!
Wonderful experience with Megan. Came for an alignment after new tires, very pleased. Would recommend and definitely will be back!
Worst customer service ever. They can’t even install a tire properly. Can’t do math either.

$1224 for some brakes and calipers on a Mazda CX9 Touring; I’m not quite sure if that is a reasonable price and I was pissed. I get in my car and it feels brand new! I don’t mind paying for quality, she’s back riding like a dream. 10/10 recommend!

Made an appointment, received a phone call 10 minutes before confirming my appointment and asking what needs to be done. My wife showed up with my car for brake inspection. They told her it would be an hour and a half wait, even with an appointment, for a simple brake inspection and if work needed to be done, they couldn’t do it today at all. The woman at the desk then proceeded to call me a liar to my wife’s face when my wife communicated that this information was never relayed to me over the phone when confirming my appointment. Point being, don’t trust them to be honest about their mistakes and crappy customer service. Waste of time.

Took my car here to get checked out because it was recommended by another car place when I was on a time crunch and this place is first come first serve. Great service, quick, and had a friendly staff!
Very friendly and helpful staff. Great prices. Definitely would recommend :)

All I wanted was some air in my tire...
Pulled up Friday And sat there for 10mins while the guy sat there and ate. Was not even acknowledged so I left. Came back Sunday, same thing happened. Is it so hard to at least acknowledge someone and tell them there will be a wait time instead of completely ignoring them?? It was by the same rude guy that was sitting there eating spaghetti Friday. Only this time He was smoking a cigarette.
Great and friendly service!

Mavis Tires in Dilworth has been a trusted source of car repairs and service for me and my family for years.   The staff, led by Jim and Megan, are outstanding.  They truly care about you, your car, and the experience you have at Mavis.   They are always efficient and timely.  They thoroughly explain your repair options.   They are so honest and if your maintenance needed light comes on and nothing is wrong they never try to sell you repairs you don’t need.  I know when they take care of my car I will drive away with the full assurance that I am ready for safe travels.  Jim and Megan are top notch and with them taking care of things me and my family will always go to Mavis on Dilworth!   Always an excellent experience over the last 20+ years!!!

I have been going to Mavis for almost two decades (including when it was Summerfield). Jim and  Megan are the most honest reps I’ve ever worked with. I’ve been to other local auto repair shops in town and it is a completely different experience. At Mavis Park Rd, I have consistently received fair quotes and excellent work. In fact, only because of convenience to downtown, I received a quote for repair at a well known shop that I thought was pretty high. I brought it to Jim at Mavis and he saved me a considerable sum that was in line with my expectations. I will always go to this location as long as Jim and Meghan are running the desk.

⭐ 1 Star (0 if I could have)

This has been one of the most inconvenient and frustrating service experiences I’ve ever had.

I chose Mavis because I was quoted a great price online and told my tires could be installed the next day after my car was towed in at 6pm. When I arrived, the tires I was promised weren’t available, and I was quoted a higher price. I went ahead with what they had, thinking I could use their “price match guarantee” later and at least get my car back quickly.

I was told my car would be ready by mid-afternoon. At 3pm, I called and was told the tire delivery was delayed 5 hours and nothing had been started yet. I received no updates. At 5:45pm, on my way there, I was told my car wasn’t even in their system, then told it was actually ready—but the store was closing at 6. I had to wait until the next morning.

When I picked up my car the next day, my TPMS warning was still on. It took another 30 minutes for them to fix it. I then submitted a price match request (with proof of a competitor’s lower price), which was declined.

After weeks of back and forth with a regional manager, nothing was resolved. I was offered a $50 gift card, which is meaningless considering I will never return after this experience. Between the bait-and-switch pricing, lack of communication, and poor customer service, I will be taking my business to other brands in the future.
Mavis at 14408 Statesville road provided excellent service for my vehicle. Ken was awesome! He was very nice and professional. Joseph was great; he was very helpful and pleasant.

Good luck trying to reach these guys. Called the local line and kept getting passed to a different call center. One in NY and one in GA. Was told they could not
Connect me to the local store and just hung up. Store team might be great. But there call center teams leave a lot to be desired.
Too rich for my blood

They worked me in for the next day. The admin was kind and proactive, remembering to call me the next day when the tires arrived and also to call me when the car was ready. Seemed like a smooth easy operation!

I made an appointment the day before to change the tires on my Ford Van T 250, which the system allows me, it allowed me, in fact, they have this model among those they serve, well it turns out that on the day of the appointment I left my job at 2 in the afternoon to be able to meet the poor schedule they have, they told me I had to be there at 4 to be seen, I called even though due to traffic I would arrive after 4, the person who answered the phone said okay don't worry come and just when I arrive they tell me we won't serve you because of the time you can come back tomorrow at 8am again I leave my job to get to the appointment and when I arrive at the appointment even before the time it turns out that their response I'M SORRY YOUR VAN DOESN'T FIT IN THE OPENING DOOR WE CAN'T SERVE YOU so then please delete that model from those that can serve you, time here is money also I stopped making appointments in a more serious place and I walk around with my damaged tires
“Great experience! Came in for a quick oil change and the service was fast, friendly, and professional. Definitely recommend!”

Excelente servicio. Tuve una muy buena atención desde que llegué con mi auto y una llanta abajo. El servicio de atención al cliente de excelente calidad, resolvió todas mis dudas y el trabajo en mi auto muy bueno y a tiempo. Definitivamente cualquier tema con mi auto volveré.

Negligence that could’ve cost lives.

I had an alignment and new tires done at this Mavis location just a few months ago. Recently, my partner noticed something felt off when turning left—like a clatter or vibration in the front end. We decided to check it out, and thank god we did.

Turns out, Mavis completely botched my alignment. The nut that connects the steering mechanism to the tires was totally loose—as in, dangerously loose to the point where the only thing holding it together was the pin. Had we gone on a high-speed drive or hit a turn wrong, we could’ve lost steering control entirely.

Let that sink in: a critical safety component of my vehicle was left unsecured after an alignment service.

This wasn’t a minor oversight—it was gross negligence. I could’ve been in a serious accident, and Mavis wouldn’t have had a clue. What’s even worse is that, because time has passed and no crash occurred, I probably can’t even get a refund or compensation—just a near-death experience and a mechanic’s warning that I got lucky.

If you’re thinking of getting alignment work done here, don’t. They’re not just careless—they’re dangerous. I’m writing this so someone else doesn’t find out the hard way.
Great job
Sam did an amazing job on my SUV, he had me in and out! Thank you Sam for all you do! Will definitely be returning for future maintenance on my SUV

Bought Brand new michelin tires ltx m/s2 255/70r 255/70r18 tires. (Literally the best tire for my truck) in June of 2025 it’s now August 2025.  I have a nail in my tire, but because I didn’t buy an extended warranty through Mavis, Mavis says I’m out of luck & it’s gonna be $300+ additional dollars for a new tire altogether.  Can’t plug or repair.  I have no issue with the staff as they are just following company policy. But I will never ever do business with this company ever again.   This is total BS~!!!!!!

I do not recommend giving any business to Mavis Tire,  just go somewhere else & skip the headache.

New car owner. First real repairs I had to do. Felt so comfortable here that I ended up having them do a few extra things because I trusted my car here. I’m glad I did. They gave it back in great shape, and an incredibly reasonable price.
Time for major work only place to go

Went in and dropped off car for basic services (oil change + inspection). Was assisted quickly upon arrival. Picking up was also quick and efficient. Pricing was very reasonable and the person who assisted me was nice and polite. I will definitely be going back for basic services again and other mechanic needs.

I have been a loyal customer to Mavis in other parts of North Carolina for years and just recently moved to Charlotte. This was the most horrific experience ever! I took my car in and paid $600 for services to find my car was scratched in the process. Jim walked out and literally licked his thumb and wiped the fresh paint chips off the scratch in front of my mom and me. He said he would look at video footage and call us after the weekend. We never received a call and were told by other employees that their video camera did not visualize that angle. We never heard from Jim and had to persistently call over two weeks to finally get in touch with a supervising manager, who reluctantly told us to get an estimate for the scratch (which is $1600). Now, I find that the initial problem that required me to take my car in the first time was not fixed, and I had to bring my car back. I go to get my keys back this second time without even bringing up the scratch and Megan and Jim began yelling at me that it's not their fault my car was scratched and instead it's my fault - it must have been my purse that scratched my car. Megan was never even involved in this situation and joined in at any opportunity to tell me that I was lying and it was my fault. Between the two of them, they would not even let me speak a single word without yelling over and at me. As a young woman, I find it mortifying how two older adults berated me in a conveniently empty lobby. It is so sad and disappointing that we have not been treated with a single ounce of kindness, respect, or even human decency. The rudeness and clear disdain for women is shocking.

First time getting my tires fixed and was worried that it’ll be too pricey or overcharged. The staff here is incredibly nice and helpful and I’ll definitely be returning and referring more people here!
Megan and Z were absolutely amazing and very helpful definitely recommend going there and ask for them
Just got my tires balanced here - they worked me in same day and explained the issue. Corrected it quickly and at a great price. This is a great location with a great team who care. Will be back!

Horrible, horrible, horrible.

After being told it would be a short wait, I was left waiting over an hour before my car was taken in.
Did not fix the issue, instead tried to sell me ridiculous priced tires.
Went to another place that was not only able to repair it, but told me I did not need tires at this time.
Seemed they were only trying to make a "buck" off someone.

I WILL NEVER recommend nor return.

Happy Sunday, I recently had my car inspected at your Mavis on 33 Parker Ave. I must say your employee James did an outstanding job. When I saw James lifting my car and taking off the tires I was so surprised because I have never had my car inspected so thoroughly. He outdid himself and I appreciate James for taking his time to fully examine my car. Thank you all for your great customer service the morning I visited. Thank you James for your attention you gave my Toyota Camry LE... I have a new place to rely on for my car needs.
Another great experience

I am writing to formally express my concern regarding an incident that occurred involving two employees, both white men, who behaved in an unprofessional and racially insensitive manner toward me and my sister.
While we were present, we overheard them making disrespectful comments about customers, specifically referring to how “slow” people are after ending a phone call. The tone and context of their remarks were highly inappropriate and made us feel deeply uncomfortable and disrespected.
Great fast service thanks carmen
Fast and affordable service! Thanks, Megan, Jim and team, for getting a new battery in my car and fixing up my AC!

Sometimes women can feel a little insecure about conducting car repair business. Today, tires was on my honey-do list 😩. So, I made an  appointment with the S. Blvd. location and started my journey. I was met by Chip at the service desk (arriving 30 mins late and panicked) with a warm greeting and understanding tone for my tardiness. Chip gave me great advice about my purchase and made me feel confident about my choice. DID I MENTION THE PRICE WAS AMAZING!!
Great place. Very knowledgeable. Very friendly. Thank you Cody and Todd.

i had a brake job done at mavis. Their technician was incompetent. the Brake line came loose and leaked all the brake fluid out. I had to pay the tow truck an  extra $100.00 for the additional miles to the servicing destination.  Run don't walk away from mavis. You don't wan your life or the lives of others put into their hands.

Walked into Mavis with a flat tire issue and Z, Jim & Meghan were super helpful and efficient, resolving my issue in less than a day. Great communication, high quality work and extremely helpful! I will definitely come back here in the future and recommend to anyone in the area!

I have been putting off getting new tires because of the price but decided it was finally time to get it done. I reached out to Mavis and they were able to get me in the very next day and had my tires in overnight! Z was kind and very communicative to me. I’m not knowledgeable on tires whatsoever, but he didn’t use that against me. Took less than 30 minutes to get it done at a very fair price. I will definitely recommend this location to all friends and family!

I had an appointment for 8 AM. They said their guy got in a wreck and so they sent me to the other shop. Things happen, but if you know you have customers with appointments just shoot them texts or give them a call. It’s common courtesy. They sent me to the other shop on trolley and they did not have the right tire size. Start to finish it wasted a good hour going to each shop then trying to find a shop with the right tire size.
Quick and very reasonably priced shop. Quick in and out service!
Great experience, great service, and great people

Came in for a tire rotation. Megan was so helpful and kind! Amazing customer service

Returned for tire repair and oil change .. again awesome customer service. Will definitely be back!

Returned for another oil change. Still the best customer service around ! We will be back

I had a great experience at Mavis Tires! The customer service was excellent -- the staff was super friendly, helpful, and made sure I understood everything about the services I needed. They worked quickly and efficiently, and I really appreciated how professional and respectful they were throughout the whole process. I'll definitely be coming back and highly recommend them to anyone needing tire or auto services!
Quick and easy!!! Always friendly and made it simple!
Good tires 🔥🔥

THANK GOD!!! MAVIS TIRES IS THE ONLY SHOP I HAVE FOUND WHO WAS OPENED ON SUNDAY IN CHARLOTTE, NC.  I WASN’T SURE IF I NEEDED A NEW TIRE OR TIRE REPAIR, I WAS IN HURRY TO GO TO WORK WITH A BAD TIRE SO I TELL YOU MAVIS TIRES & BRAKES SAVED THE DAY🙏🏾🙏🏾🙏🏾!!!! THEY ARE VERY PROFESSIONAL, THEY NEVER TRIED TO TAKE ADVANTAGE OF ME BY MAKING ME BUY A NEW TIRE. THEY TOLD ME MY TIRE CAN BE REPAIRED AND THEY FINISHED THE JOB ON TIME. SO KUDDOS TO MAVIS TIRES & BRAKES ON SOUTH BLVD.. 28209 🙌🏽🙌🏽🌻🌻🌻

Megan and Jim are absolute lifesavers! I came in stressed about a leak in my sunroof, and not only did they take care of it quickly — they gave me a great deal. That kind of honesty and customer care is hard to find these days. I’ve been to Mavis before for tires, and this experience just confirmed I’ll be a loyal customer for life. Meanwhile I’m waiting until the brake check is completed. 20 minutes later I asked was my car ready because I was just waiting. So the Caucasian guy checks on my car comes back and asks who worked on my car last? My question was what to you mean who worked only car? He asked who changed my tire because the tire was torqued too tight and they could not get the tire off to check the brakes. I said I only get my tires from Mavis. So then the blonde mechanic says we checked and it looked like the Mavis in Moncks Corner changed your tire a year ago( if you knew that already why ask). So now the guy with the dark hair goes in the computer to give me a printout of the work that need to be performed at my request because I could not remember all of what he claimed I needed. I never got the print out. Next question was who changed the oil? ( I’m thinking huh? What does this have to do with anything) He tried to say that when I got my oil change they may have over torque the lugs..I told them they only changed the oil and didn’t touch the tires. Finally I guess he could think of anything else and says I may need to take it to Mecedes. If it took all those excuses instead of saying mam we could not get to your car today. have been using and buying tires from this location for years. The convenience and proximity to my home, makes it tough to not. But today, after several times, putting up with the nonchalant, non-service attitude of Jimmy at the front counter, today I decided it was my last time.

Over the weekend, with a son home from school, I discovered a significant gas in the sidewall of a tire. I could see no evidence of penetrating completely through, but to be safe I paid to order tires for arrival first thing Monday morning, at least time I plan to have the tire looked at and to determine whether to replace or not before my teenage son drove three hours back to school.

The young woman at the front of the counter, when I asked if a tech could look at the tire, said that she wasn’t a tech and might not know, but she would look at it. And she did, she came out, spoke to the significance, of the size, but said that she wanted to ask him to come out and look at the tire because she wasn’t sure.  Mind you, no customer had entered the entire time I was there. I was the only customer in person for them to deal with.

And yet and still, not only did he not come out, he sent word by her that it was cosmetic without laying eyes on the tire. Something that could’ve taken two minutes to alleviate the concerns of a parent, wanting to make sure his son was safe, instead he chose to remain behind his desk, doing whatever on the keyboard, he thought to be more critical than providing customer service.

And with that, this six vehicle household will never use Mavis again, especially if someone that I would assume to be a parent, or maybe even a grandparent, wouldn’t have enough compassion for a protective father to spend five minutes in providing his professional opinion.

I think I realize that the “professional” characteristic may be missing.

I had the worst experience with Mavis tire. If you have a BMW or similar German car, I highly urge you to not bring your car here.

I had a slow leak flat tire and this was the nearest tire shop. I called them in advance and they told me to drop off my car. I dropped it early in the morning around 9am. Jim called about 30 mins later and said I needed it replaced and also needed the other rear tire replaced. They don’t have the tires onsite so he said I had to give him the green light to place the order by 11am to get the tires onsite by 1pm. I asked for a pickup time and said I would get my car back around 3pm. He failed to call me at any point in the afternoon and I called at 4:30pm after 5 hours of no communication. At 4:30pm he answers and says they haven’t started working on my car yet. I asked if they would call me before they close to get my car back and he says yes. He calls at 5:45 15 mins before they close and tells me that I won’t get my car back today. He claims they were working it for 45 minutes and couldn’t get the lug nut off. I’m not sure why you would start working on my car right before they close after dropping it off early in the morning. He shared BMWs are much more difficult to get these off and said it was stripped with whoever did it before. He claims now they have to charge me for all of this labor and for the labor they will have to keep working on it the next day. He could not give me any idea of an estimate. Interestingly, they never called me before they started doing all this labor for consent knowing it was not an easy job nor did they inform me they were having a hard time with it. If I knew they couldn’t do it I would have never brought it to them. I am so confused at this point about how it could possibly take this long. The next morning (today) I call at 8:05 right when they open and Megan answers and apparently Jim is not working today and he did not brief her on my situation. I reshare everything and she tells me she will get with the technician to see what they can do this morning. She is very defensive about what Jim shared with me the day before but understood my frustration. I asked what this is going to cost me and again she says they have no idea because they don’t know how many hours this could take. I called my European/german car shop for a second opinion and a few other German shops in the area. They ALL told me there is a specific BMW extraction tool to remove the lug stud and is not uncommon to see but only the dealership has this tool. She calls me back and tells me they are not able to continue working on my car and that I will need to get it towed to somewhere else because they can’t get it off but claimed her strongest technician was working this and still couldn’t get it off. She denies the insight I shared from the other German shops that there is no specific BMW extraction tool and claims they work on BMWs all the time and this is not a capability or equipment issue.. but can’t get it off. Obviously I proceeded to call BMW for feedback given what the other German shops said and they said this is an easy fix. I got a tow and it was brought to BMW. Lo and behold they get it off in 5 minutes and they said it was not difficult. Lesson learned I will never be coming here again. Mavis was also charging me for an alignment that BMW said I did not need. I only ended up spending $100 at BMW and in addition that included running a full safety check on my car and replaced all the lug studs with standard ones. I got my car back in an hour. I urge you to not bring your BMW or similar vehicle to Mavis. Just an overall awful experience and costed me not having my car for 2 days that BMW fixed so quickly.

At 4:30pm I called asking when they thought it would be ready and I was told it was in the shop right now and they will call me when they are done. They close at 6pm so at 5:30pm I headed over even tho they didn’t call me and they said they havnt got to my car yet and it will have to be done tomorrow so I took my car and left. My car was there right when they opened, I had an appointment, it was there for 10 hours and it wasn’t touched.  I wish they were honest when i called that it wasn’t going to be done today instead of lying saying it was in the shop right now
Showed us family care and great prices

I bought 2 new tires from this Mavis location.

It was a nightmare. They replaced the incorrect tires that I requested to have changed, then lied about it. Following that, they tried to make me buy 2 new additional tires to resolve the original issue! Do not trust this place.
Guys in the shop are very helpful and polite. Needed air in my tires in a hurry and they went above and beyond.

I had a nail in one of the tires on our new car and we stopped by Mavis and they got us right in and back on the road in less than 30 minutes!! Denny is awesome!! I would recommend this Mavis shop for all of your tire needs.

A staff member at this store told me he wouldn't replace my brake pads with the pads I purchased at the dealer (genuine manufacturer pads for my specific model and year for pete's sake) even when I explained that another Mavis location was unable to find the correct pads to fit my car from their supplier. He also said he would only replace pads if I replaced my rotors too. Hello, but pads may last 20,000, while rotors may last 50,000. Was this because he heard a female voice and determined I knew nothing, or is he just a scammer? Either way, doesn't get my business.

Keenan is the man to deal with. Very honest and professional. He showed me exactly what my car needed and how to best deal with it, then gave me some excellent pricing. Every bit a gentleman and a pleasure to deal with. Respect is the word of the day folks.

Julie Jaxz Zee at this place are A1 customer service. I came in stressing about my vehicle and thinking I wouldn’t get fit in without appointment but they were able to get everything squared away in a reasonably short time. They kept me updated with the status of my vehicle and made sure I knew the issues and offered very reasonable prices for parts.
Customer service is a high priority at this location. Helpful and didn't charge me for unnecessary services. I look forward to bringing all our vehicles here.
Mavis gave me one of the best experiences I’ve had in car maintenance.  They were able to work me in. The service was incredible.  Professional friendly. Julie and Megan are the greatest.
Literally no one came to even greet me at the desk. I left after 5 minutes.
Bought 4 tires here. Made an appointment online for my free rotation, show up on time and they say it will take at least 3 hours. They don't take appointments. What???
Brie and Ryan were so kind and helpful. I was super stressed, but they got my tire fixed up in no time. Very thorough.

Brought our car to this location for a new tire. My fiancé had to discover on her own after getting home that they placed the wrong size tire on. Was told to come the next morning to replace it for a correct one and they would eat the cost of the difference (minimal). I had to wait 15 minutes before someone came from out back and told me that the regional manager was there and that I would have to wait since that was the priority at the moment. We have brought 2 cars in this year for new tires and brakes and to be told I would have to wait longer on an issue that was their mistake was incredibly rude and disappointing. This is the first negative review I have ever felt the need to post for what it is worth.

Jim is a total disgrace to the company. I brought in my Toyota 4runner after it had a few issues Jim informed me that I would need a new key to begin with any process. He then told me my computer was fried. I read the reviews and decide to get it relocated and I figure out the key Jim sold me for a few hundred bucks is a knock off bullshit key that wouldn't even start my car anyway. I wouldn't recommend this to anyone. Try CMD Auto Repair they got me fixed up in no problem after Jim took over a week to figure out 1 problem and still didn't even fix it.

Another Mavis store referred me to this location because they had the equipment and experience needed to replace my car 's fuel pump, which they did the next day. As at all the Mavis stores I've visited, the service was fast, professional, friendly, and the price was fair. I've been a loyal customer for many years and plan to remain so.

Julie was awesome. That lady is smart and clearly passionate about cars and the mechanics behind them. I brought my Jeep in for a rotate and balance and left with a wealth of knowledge and a big smile. It was a refreshing experience.

Do not trust this place. I don’t often leave bad reviews, but this was the worst experience I’ve had with any auto service provider and I want to save others money
who might be on budget like my family. Booked online for tire replacement and dropped car off with no problems. I got a call that I needed to make sure my wheels were aligned (which should be a part of installation but fine) and that I needed two fluids topped off and front windshield wipers replaced. Expected to probably pay about $75-100 more at most. I should have asked the price because they charged me almost $500 more. When I questioned the manager how in the world that was possible, he said that’s what the services cost and asked if I wanted a Mavis credit card to pay it on with 6 months no interest. Unbelievable. I probably focused too much on making sure he didn’t open a credit card rather than making him reduce the costs. I will never go back here or to any Mavis, even if they promised free service I wouldn’t trust them. Save yourself the trouble and a lot of money and go elsewhere.

Beware! They don’t know how to estimate the time it takes to change tires and they will try to sell you on things you probably don’t need… classic conmen. They severely underestimated how long the service would take, making it difficult for my husband to pickup the car in time before closing. On top of that, they sold us what they said were necessary services without telling us up front the cost to do so. We ended up paying way more than we budgeted. Also when you try to call the line rings and rings and rings and no one answers. Can really tell they value their customers! You all should be ashamed of yourselves. We will never come here again and we’ll never recommend Mavis to friends.

Beware of tire installation… I write this as wait for a tow truck because neither I or AAA could loosen the lug nuts on a tire installed by this Mavis location (even with a breaker bar)… The tire’s lug nuts were over tightened; first time I couldn’t change my own tire…

Went to the Park Rd location in Charlotte,NC and these clowns quotes me a price of $1800 to replace my brake pads. They are totally untrustworthy.... STAY AWAY!!! This is not the first time I witnessed this company fleecing customers ...
Great service every time here and quality has never disappointed!  Highly recommend for tires and getting your car checked over.
The staff was professional I had a nail in my tire and were honest about the solutions, they were able to get me back on the road. 10/10 would comeback

This is the second time in two months we had a flat and needed a quick replacement. Mavis took us as walk ins both times. They explained the options, gave us the expected timeline, and set realistic expectations when they were understaffed. The service rep stayed late to get my quote prepared and called with the numbers. The tires were repaired same day for one car, and the next day for another car. Prices are comparable to anywhere else. Very satisfied with the experience, will go back if we need tire replacements again.
They were clear in the price, customer service was excellent. I would recommend this location to my friends and family.
I had an tire issue and Mavis solved it ASAP! Thank you, guys for your service. I value the fact you're open on Sunday 9-5pm.

I had tires delivered from Amazon here. They put them on and did an alignment. Everything was done in a timely manner and everyone was professional. Keaton, awesome customer service. Qua, on my alignment. and Mike in my tires. thank you guys ! I will be back .
Great experience!!! The staff was friendly and did an excellent job. I had a nail in my tire and they got me all patched up and on my way. Will be coming back for all my tire needs

10/10 recommend. i called before going in and was able to get all the information i needed very clearly. went to the shop and walked in, mentioned i had spoken to someone on the phone, was helped immediately, and served immediately. then they completed the job very quickly!! overall great experience, i typically procrastinate going to get service on my car because it can be a dreading process but i was very pleased with the shop and their employee!!
I want to commend Mark at Mavis tire and brake service for his impeccable customer service in Brandon MS.
